---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for N2O
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What workflow is difficult or impossible today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples. If this relates to specific Notion block types or property types, please mention them.
